title: Lawn & Grass Conditioner Speedy Seed Mixture Lush Lawn 1,2kg Organic Fertiliser Restoration Repair Defra Approved
features: Worry Free Child And Pet Friendly Lush Green Lawns With No Chemicals
Lush Lawn Is Tailored to The UK Climate, And Is Defra Certified
Wide Coverage Area of 17 sq Meters (Seed Rate 70g per m2) In Handy Shake Box
The Ingredients In This Product Have Been Specially Selected To Fill Gaps & Give a Lush Even Result
100% Eco Friendly Organic Lawn Fertiliser Shaker Box is Made With FSC & Recycled Board
description: Product Description Lawn & Grass Conditioner Speedy Seed Mixture Lush Lawn 1,2kg Organic Fertiliser Restoration Repair Defra Approved Directions 1. Apply the product evenly on your lawn at a rate of 70g per square meter. 2. Ensure children and pets stay away from the treated area until the product has been watered in and absorbed by the soil. 3. Water the lawn thoroughly after application. Safety Warning Keep children and pets away from treated area until product is absorbed by the soil. See more
